reviews.review_description: I’m into my fourth year working out with Supernatural and still loving it. There’s nothing else like it out there in terms of VR fitness. In my opinion it is well worth the subscription price, despite there being no new content added. The existing library is massive and varied in music genres. The choreography, graphics, and coaching  are all fantastic.

reviews.review_title: Amazing app! So sad its abandoned
reviews.review_description: Best fitness app in my opinion. The coaches and the flow of the workouts are simply perfect. It just doesn't make sense that they are still charging the same monthly subscription fees knowing that no new content will be released...
I hope they can transfer this to one time payment, affitional music should be the one purchased. I find it expensive both monthly or yearly sub. So sad because I love this.

developer_response.body: Hi there -  While we will not be creating new workout content, we will be releasing some pre-recorded workouts that were already scheduled for release. Our original post (https://www.facebook.com/groups/getsupernatural/permalink/25501793049447101/) has been updated to clarify this. Your Supernatural membership still provides access to the thousands of existing workouts, meditations, and programs that have been released over the years. Please feel free to reach out to us at support@getsupernatural.com if you have any questions. Thanks!

reviews.review_description:
Almost one week and 5 workouts and 5lbs off. You have to try to see and feel the difference. I'm 58 and I can't remember the last time I felt this good mentally and physically. I'm sleeping better, waking up more refreshed to face the day. 

But unfortunately I won't subscribe now knowing that no new more content or updates will be coming

reviews.review_title: Used to Love, No Longer Like
reviews.review_description: I've been a member since 2022. I've completed 1,038 sessions and accumulated 406.74K points. I played a lot more during the years 2022-2024. It used to be the workouts felt curated for you from the trainers and choreographers to get a good workout in. The movements felt natural and made sense. This wasn't a rhythm game, it was a workout app. But in 2024, the direction changed to be more like a rhythm game. The movements feel less natural. I have to go back to workouts from 2021-2023 to find anything I enjoy doing. I've tried the multi intensity workouts, but their lows don't feel right compared to the lows of the past. I don't like the super speed. I miss when the newly released workouts were ones that challenged you, but still felt possible. This could be due to my own limitations but regardless, I wanted to update my review before my subscription ends. It was fun.

reviews.review_title: More Than a Workout It’s a Whole Vibe
reviews.review_description:
Supernatural Fitness has genuinely changed the way I look at working out. I used to struggle with motivation, but this makes it EASY to show up because it’s actually fun. It doesn’t feel like “ugh, I have to work out”… it feels like I GET to. Every session flies by, I’m sweating like crazy, and somehow I’m smiling the whole time.

What I love most is how much it’s helped me physically and mentally. I feel stronger, my endurance is improving, and I leave each workout feeling proud of myself like I did something good for my body AND my mind. It’s become one of the best parts of my routine.

And the coaches + guests? Absolutely the pillars of this whole experience. They bring the energy, the encouragement, the perfect push, and the kind of vibe that makes you feel included no matter where you’re starting from. They keep it uplifting, motivating, and real like you’re not doing it alone.

If you’ve ever struggled to stay consistent, Supernatural Fitness is the answer. Fun, challenging, empowering, and honestly addictive in the best way. 10/10 recommend. 💪🔥✨

A lot of people are complaining they won’t be adding new workouts but there are so many I can’t imagine ever being bored with this app. Great music, great coaches and endless options. I love it. It’s only $10 a month and I feel like I’m getting more than my money’s worth.
I got Meta Quest a few years ago just for Supernatural and it did not disappoint.  100% recommend.  Great workouts every day at home, love it.

reviews.review_title: Once past that first coach it was great!
reviews.review_description:
Update: Got this in May 2025, here we are in December 2025 and I LOVE this work out so much!! I have only missed three days so far. For a woman that's spent a lifetime falling off the workout wagon after a couple of months, that's a RECORD.  :)) I've done short, medium and long workouts.  In teams you get an almost hiit workout, plus enough colorful experiences to wonder if you took mushrooms today.   I almost didn't get past the first coach, she was soooo chipper. I'm in my 70's,  recovering from shingles and walking pneumonia - nothing could have grated more than that coach.   But I got past her tutorials (she does them all) and got to the others and so far I like all of them.  But the workout itself is absolutely ideal for a person like me who had to start out slow, shortest songs, around 3 minutes..... Then sit for an hour to recover.  Now I'm at 16 minutes and it hasn't been a full week. If you're looking for something really fun and also really effective... Supernatural is a must have. 

I like Beat Saber, I love Synth Riders and now I love Supernatural more than the other two put together.  Note, everyone else overweight,  loses weight doing this workout.  Not me. Apparently I just eat more.  :))

I love SN! I started in October. A friend of mine got me turned onto it. I can work out at any time because it’s just at my fingertips. It’s like playing a video game, but you’re working out and you can find your favorite music! It’s so much fun. I’ve met fun people to work out with . I do wish they offered yoga. That’s the only downside.

Margaret
This app is no longer updating. Don't waste your money

developer_response.body: Hi there -  While we will not be creating new workout content, we will be releasing some pre-recorded workouts that were already scheduled for release. Our original post (https://www.facebook.com/groups/getsupernatural/permalink/25501793049447101/) has been updated to clarify this. Your Supernatural membership still provides access to the thousands of existing workouts, meditations, and programs that have been released over the years. Supernatural will remain fully active for all members, and you can continue to enjoy the entire library as long as your membership is active. Please feel free to reach out to us at support@getsupernatural.com if you have any questions. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: The graphics are great the game play is fine... Although often the music does not actually sync to the beat with the incoming targets which is super annoying. That's kind of like the whole point. The trainers are more obnoxious than words can describe...
It was the best and now its the worst.  Canceled my sub and trashed my quest. Back to reality with Bodi.

I used to constantly struggle to make it to the gym. I’d buy a membership, go once or twice, and then life would get in the way again. But Supernatural? Total game changer. Now I can jump into an amazing workout anytime morning, midnight, whenever I’m feeling it. Want to sweat it out with a partner? Done. Want to go full beast mode on my own? Absolutely.
Thank you, Supernatural, for creating a place where getting healthy and getting in shape finally fits my life and lets me crush my goals on my own terms!

reviews.review_title: Great game concept, much room to improve
reviews.review_description: Have to make sure to power the unit at the best spot to exercise since the developers did not think of using the center of the zone to locate the base.... The coaches are very annoying especially for the warm up and cool down which I always skip. A lot of the movements and music combos are horrible so you have to get to know which ones to avoid over time. In short this is the window 3.1 of VR exercise. One day it will be good. Now it is a great idea not well executed.
Love this app
I love love love this app it has excede my expectations love the music the coaches the energy is life changing

I love being healthy and really hate gyms, so I fought with myself for decades, doing boring home workouts regularly and then not doing them when life got complicated. Finally I settled on years of 150 moderate activity walking minutes a week, and weights when the mood struck. Not ideal, particularly in our rainy city.

Working out in spectacular outdoor virtual spaces to music with inspiring coaching has significantly changed my life. At 64, after 7 months of at least five fun workout days a week, I feel stronger than ever, no longer ache when I stand up after sitting, have more energy, sleep better, and my mental health is notably better despite the times we live in. Most importantly, the +/-8 days each month I used to lose to migraines are mine again ... I now get about one migraine a month and it's treatable with medication and a nap. 

My Quest headset+ Supernatural subscription are by far the best investments I've ever made.

Help. I can't log into the supernatural app on my phone to look at my progress and other things. It keeps telling me to install it on my headset when it's already there. I have tried everything and I don't know what to do and I sent messages on Facebook and nobody's responding. I would very much appreciate some sort of response so that I can continue looking at things on my Facebook app. I use the headset every single morning lately and everything seems to be focused on the headset app and there's no Facebook connection. It just keeps telling me something's wrong. Please help

developer_response.body: Hi there! We are sorry to hear that you're experiencing some issues. Please reach out to us at support@getsupernatural.com or utilize our Live Chat feature on getsupernatural.com/faq for immediate assistance. We'll be happy to assist, thanks again for your patience!

reviews.review_description: You guys. Don’t listen to any negative reviews on here, this game is insanely fun !! I’m a huge gamer and i bought the meta quest to play my games but i was scrolling through the app store and i see this, and im like oh this is cool its like a cute VR nature app… i haven’t touched any of my games in weeks this is all i’ve been playing 😭 The music selection is SICK!! And the subscription is 100% worth it, people are making it sound like it’s a gazzilion dollars a month lol, the coaches are AMAZING! I love how positive they are, i’ve completely forgotten her name but i specifically find ones so i can hear her, she’s very positive and talks about over coming battles and mental barriers and it seriously just brightens my mood. Oh i’ve also haven’t gone to the gym in weeks since i downloaded this. It goes by so fast as well if you’re jamming out, it’s so lovely i’m so happy this exists. Download and subscribe asap!
Love love love it

The Supernatural workout is becoming useless.  It is more annoying now to use.  It kept on freezing during workout.  It was infrequent before, but now it stops the video, and crashes every few seconds.  Really annoying. BIG WASTE of time now.

developer_response.body: Hi there! We are sorry to hear that you're experiencing some issues. Please reach out to us at support@getsupernatural.com or utilize our Live Chat feature on getsupernatural.com/faq for immediate assistance. We'll be happy to assist, thanks again for your patience!

reviews.review_description: It stopped syncing with my Apple Watch heart rate.   Wasted a ton of time trying to fix to no avail.

developer_response.body: Hi there! We are sorry to hear that you're experiencing some issues. Please reach out to us at support@getsupernatural.com or utilize our Live Chat feature on getsupernatural.com/faq for immediate assistance. We'll be happy to assist, thanks again for your patience!

reviews.review_description:
I’m in my 3rd year with Supernatural and it will always be my favorite exercise program! Nothing even comes close in comparison to your brilliant, challenging and fun workouts! I especially enjoy playing online with my sister who lives 1,200 miles away from me. I absolutely love your wide variety of music choices, but I want to recommend a band that would be the icing on the cake to your Indie-structable genre. CAAMP! Their catchy, upbeat songs would be the perfect soundtrack to some amazing and vigorous workouts! 
Thank you for creating this magnificent program! It’s drastically improved my level of fitness, therefore it’s drastically improved my quality life!

developer_response.body: Thanks for rating our app. Glad to hear it's what you've been looking for. Thanks again for being part of the Supernatural community. Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions or requests. You can reach us at support@getsupernatural.com. We love hearing from all of you!

reviews.review_description: this is a great app and it is worth the gym fee to get yourself into shape from the comfort of your own home you can do it!

reviews.review_title: Great for busy people and a fun sweat
reviews.review_description: Plenty of options and settings. I love that you can do high intensity , medium, and low and they have a variety of lengths and genres of music to select from. This may be why it is subscription based BUT if you try this and like it you can replace a gym or a run with it. Its great. You can have the coach envourage you while in a nature setting punching, ducking, and kicking away stress. I sweat so much I put a wash cloth over the top of my head and it is usually damp by the time i finish my workouts so i would recommend a silicone cover for the face around the lenses because you will sweat. As someone who would never be caught dead in a workout class i think this is great and always right there anytime you have your quest

reviews.review_title: It has its merits, but no.
reviews.review_description:
I cannot justify renewing a subscription at $100 a year for what's offered. I would be a lifetime member if they allowed one to choose the songs one wishes to work out. It is incomprehensible why they ignore all requests to do so. 

This app limits your workouts depending on whether you would rather shove a pencil in your brain via your earhole than listen to the arranged songs in the grouped workouts. So skip a song and deal with the fallout, or listen to the music you would never contemplate otherwise. Is it the end of the world? No. It's a significant inconvenience to the end user for no apparent reason.  Would it require divine intervention for the end user to select the songs they want to work out to, and the system stacks them together into a viable workout?  It is not rocket surgery.    This is the cleanest and crispest option on Meta, period.  I only wish the end-user experience were of importance. Perhaps some other vendor will pick up the dropped ball and allow end user customization.

Love the trainers, love that you can pick how hard or easy you work out. Sometimes you're not feeling up to par, but you know you need to get moving. I love the variety of different kinds of music. Different kinds of personalities in the trainers. They make you stretch before you take on the work out, which taught me how to stretch before I go to work. They have meditation sessions if you need to calm your inner self. Just love the variety of moves as we dance to the songs. The price isn't too bad to have a trainer with you 24/7 a day exercise sessions and in fabulous places. Trainers are funny, motivated, and helpful. Try it, you'll love it!

Long story short, if you are like me and trying to get back into fitness after years of struggling with health issues, you might like this. I love the immersion, 3D experience because it helps me tune out the world around me and focus on me for a change. The different places around the world are beautiful and exercise no longer feels like a chore. 

I only wish there was a way to make our own music lists and turn off the coaching volume, some of them talk too much as I am trying to get into a rhythm with the music. 

Overall, for me it is worth the cost.

developer_response.body:
Hey there! Thanks for your feedback—glad you’re enjoying Supernatural! We appreciate your request for customizable playlists.

We actually have a feature called Focus Mode that lets you mute coach instructions during workouts. If you need help using it, feel free to contact us at support@getsupernatural.com. We’re happy to help! Thank you.

reviews.review_description:
Reviews make it seem like something new and exciting. It isn't. It's another punch stuff to music game, but with the twist of charging you monthly. Whatever, it's fine. Let's move past it because it l
et's you attach your fitness watch to include biometrics. Sounds great. Turns out, you need another app. And by the way, you can't just attach your watch directly to it. You're going to need to attach your watch to your phone and that to your quest and if the creek don't rise you just might get some metrics attached... But probably not. That plus the way too long unskippable briefings on how to do basic things make this an app to skip. Stick with the other punch stuff to music games and you'll get the same workout with way less hassle.

I renewed my subscription after cancelling it (I had the old Oculus that they no longer supported) and finally decided to upgrade. I love their songs and the coaches are really motivating. I find myself burning more calories through this game than I do on my $4k treadmill!

Have to calibrate every single time and it is awful to watch a 5 minutes video every single time I need to recalibrate. WHY I can't just put my height like every single other game. Also my pixel watch doesn't send any telemetry even after connecting everything. Some of the music doesn't fit the targets. The difficulty on some "easy" and "medium" level are just really hard for no reason. Looks like the game have to many bugs and I don't see the developer sending updates regularly.

developer_response.body: Hi there! We are sorry to hear that you're experiencing some issues. Please reach out to us at support@getsupernatural.com or utilize our Live Chat feature on getsupernatural.com/faq for immediate assistance. We'll be happy to assist, thanks again for your patience!

reviews.review_description:
I had been using Les Mills Body Combat and liked it well enough, but after a few months got tired of the music selection.
Supernatural seemed cool but I wasn’t excited for the subscription fee. After researching the music and seeing the huge selection I finally caved and subscribed.
I was most interested in the boxing workouts. After play this for over a week I can say Les Mills has better gameplay. The targets in this app are hard to track. They are super floaty, follow an arcing paths, they come out of multiple locations and tend to sneak up on you throwing off your rhythm. The target patterns aren’t always well thought out. The designers seem to just throw a bunch of targets at you quickly and it doesn’t seem like a lot of thought was put into the routine. Don't throw targets at me while I'm being asked to switch my stance. Seriously - give me a beat to switch my stance! There is also no feedback if you are dodging or squatting correctly. The lines just kinda fly by? Speaking of the squat and dodge indicator they are super hard to read as to what you want me to do. Note to designers and artist for this game. Take a look at Les Mills and how they communicate player actions and feedback - it's way more readable than what you are doing here.
Discovered this from my son. I love Supernatural. The workouts are fun and to do them in my living room makes it even better. I’ve been recommending!
I sure do love this it’s better than anything else I’ve tried
I hike, do yoga, run a rescue farm by myself… I have never sweat the way I can after an 18 minute workout on this app. I love it!
I can't get it to connect to my phone with the app on phone and on the headset but keeps saying a issues Occurred

developer_response.body: Hi there! We are sorry to hear that you're experiencing some issues. Please reach out to us at support@getsupernatural.com or utilize our Live Chat feature on getsupernatural.com/faq for immediate assistance. We'll be happy to assist, thanks again for your patience!

reviews.review_description: Disabled, nearing 60 yrs old, and having never worked out a day in my life, the very LAST thing I expected (or wanted) to do with my new VR headset was to work out. I only bought it to play some games I’ve been really wanting to try. If you had told me 2 months ago that I’d be spending 98% of my time in a fitness app, I would have absolutely told you you’re lying -but I’ve been working out 20-60 minutes a day ever since!!! I LOVE it! Not only am I having a blast, but I am developing muscle tone & feeling stronger every day!

I love using Supernatural but sadly it is not available in Mexico so I have to cancel my subscription until I return to Canada. There is not a better one that using boxing and sticks with great music and graphics.

reviews.review_title: Great app to help stay fit!
reviews.review_description: The subscription is way too pricey. Aside from that, I love everything about the app. This is just an extra fun little workout I add to my day and I always look forward to it! Definitely recommend!

I tried this for free and thought I wouldn’t like it better than any other similar game. BUT

I really like it. I’m glad I was wrong. It is a GREAT workout that is not just like all the others. The coaches are like real work out coaches and say not be helpful and interesting things, some of which I believe is based on what you are doing in real time.  

Also I really like how accepting and affirming they are for ALL people. The pride month and black history month workouts are FANTASTIC. I find them pretty inspiring, especially in today’s climate  

AND they have great accessibility options so that anyone can use it to get moving in the ways that they can. 
‘I was able to use this when I had a shoulder injury, but there are other options as well. So, like I said, friendly to ALL.
I am excited every evening to workout now. Wonderful music and great activities for everybody. Thank you supernatural!!!

Contrary to others beliefs, "SUPER NATURAL FITNESS," is more than just "punching stuff!!" 
It offers so much more!! 

I'm a 59 year old woman that had a heart attack after leaving my grandsons baseball game! I spent  9 days in the hospital and several additional months in rehabilitation! 

Firstly, I have to speak about the instructors. They offer the motivation I need from beginning to end! I feel like they are truly talking to me!!  

Secondly, the music selection is phenomenal! I get to choose the tone and intensity of my work outs! I can workout with ARETHA FRANKLIN, DMX, MICHAEL JACKSON, PHIL COLLINS, EMINEM, etc  

Lastly, the cost to get the full SUPER NATURAL FITNESS EXPERIENCE is worth it because I loss 18 pounds in 8 weeks! !! and it's a lot cheaper than most

developer_response.body: Hey there! Thanks for the feedback. I'm glad to hear you're loving Supernatural! We really appreciate the kind words about our Coaches as well. Thanks again, and keep up the great work! :)

reviews.review_description: Stuck at logins screen.. Canceling subscription and uninstalling.. Too bad it didn't work on my Q3

developer_response.body: Hi there! We are sorry to hear that you're experiencing some issues. Please reach out to us at support@getsupernatural.com or utilize our Live Chat feature on getsupernatural.com/faq for immediate assistance. We'll be happy to assist, thanks again for your patience!

reviews.review_description:
Long long ago in my 20’s and 30’s I was fit. I worked out and was very active. Then the dreaded 40’s and 50’s came along and I had no energy and my body ballooned.
My sister convinced me by bringing over her oculus and had me try SN, and  after 10 mins on low level I  was spent. Long story short, I kept at it and now after 9 months of working out an hour a day, and I’m feeling and looking so much better. 
The reason for this , is because it’s fun. ￼   
Ive lost weight and have gained purpose and maintained muscle .
The beauty of the SN is that anyone can do it!

I have been with supernatural for about a year now . The app won't let me log in i reset my password and still doesn't work this is annoying.  Please fix the glitch supernatural. And every time I get on my headset I have to calibrate it. Have to sit through the coaches instructions its very annoying Please fix this 😑 other than this I love supernatural. If I didn't have these problems I'd give 4 star also un able to connect my watch to the app there are cheaper fitness apps that can give same results . If you want to be on top fix these things . You're graphics are better than most apps though that's the only reason I haven't left yet.

developer_response.body: Hi there! We are sorry to hear that you're experiencing some issues. Please reach out to us at support@getsupernatural.com or utilize our Live Chat feature on getsupernatural.com/faq for immediate assistance. We'll be happy to assist, thanks again for your patience!

reviews.review_description: I would love to continue working out of there was good Christian music!

I love this app. I have used it daily for over a year and a half. The newly added " superspeed" is great. The problem is that there are not enough 30 minute plus Pros only workouts. I do the same ones over and over on superspeed. I noticed that several workouts have been re-released in all three levels. Why can't pros only be included to make 4 levels on all the flow workouts? I need more variety to stay challenged and interested.

developer_response.body: Thanks for rating our app! We're glad you love the new SuperSpeed feature. We appreciate your suggestion to add more 30+ minute Pros-Only workouts and will share it with our team for future consideration. Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions or feature/workout requests at support@getsupernatural.com. We love hearing from all of you! Thanks again for being part of the Supernatural community.

reviews.review_description: I love the music that goes with the workouts. There’s so much fun and the variety is awesome. ￼
Enough fun that I look forward to the workout.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Supernatural Support is Truly Exceptional

I’ve been a loyal Supernatural member since 2021, and this recent experience has reminded me exactly why. When I reached out with an issue, Rhen from the Supernatural support team was quick to respond, incredibly professional, and went out of their way to take care of me as a long-term customer.

What stood out the most was the human connection, something that’s becoming rare in customer service. I wasn’t met with copy-paste replies or endless “please be patient” messages. I was heard, understood, and treated like a valued member of the community.

Supernatural doesn’t just provide an amazing fitness experience, they back it up with a team that truly takes care of their people. That’s something worth celebrating.

Thank you, Rhen, and the entire Supernatural team, you’re awesome!

I’m absolutely loving Supernatural! It’s an amazing workout with great music, stunning graphics, and intense sessions, especially the Pro-only workouts, which really push you to your limits. The energy and atmosphere make it easy to stay engaged.
One thing I’d love to see added is more personal challenges and goal-tracking features. For example, being able to view your past scores right before starting a session would give you something concrete to push toward. If this feature is already in the app, I might have missed it, but I think it would be great to have it front and center.
It would also be nice to have more workout variety beyond boxing and bat sessions. A pre-made workout schedule would be amazing too, so you don’t have to search for what to do each day. I know there are some collections already, but having more of those would make it even easier to stay consistent.
Overall, it’s a fantastic fitness experience that’s already one of my favorites; just a few tweaks could make it perfect!

developer_response.body: Thanks for rating our app. Glad to hear it's what you've been looking for. Thanks again for being part of the Supernatural community. Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions or feature requests. You can reach us at support@getsupernatural.com. We love hearing from all of you!

reviews.review_description:
I really enjoy certain coaches, helps me feel motivated and guided during the exercise. Other coaches bother me so I like that I can turn in focus mode and tune them out. 

Overall the music is good. I feel like the electronic is good or really bad. Feel they are under serving the genre that I like most. I've given them feedback about what kind of music I would like to hear more. But all I got was kind of excuses as to why they couldn't introduce that very easily. So I feel like that was a little bit of a cop-out answer. 

All in all I can get difficulties great I do wish they had more pros only workouts. As sometimes even the hard workouts don't feel hard enough. 

Overall really enjoy it and I recommend it to everybody

developer_response.body: Hey there! Thanks for the feedback, glad to hear you're loving Supernatural! We're glad to hear you enjoy our coaches and the overall experience. We appreciate your thoughts on the music and workout difficulty, and we will keep them in mind as we continue to improve. Thanks again and keep up the great work :)

reviews.review_title: I'd give this app 10 stars if I could
reviews.review_description: If you're like me and trying to find a way to wanna work out. TRY. THIS. I have never ever ever had fun nor wanted to exercise a day in my life, till I downloaded this app. It's fun, it's dynamic, it's motivating, and it guides you every step of the way. I cannot say enough good things about this program. 10 out of 10 !

Started the trial today and the app is great. The coaches are great so far, music, interface, etc. If I could recommend anything, it would be the color of the targets. For some reason, they blend together for me. The targets to block, blend in with the other targets. In my opinion, at least. Are bright/neon colors not realistic for every user? I am enjoying it though. That's my only petty complaint. I'm new to the quest and will try other apps, but this has been very enjoyable today. Another petty request.... More music from Octane on SiriusXM. :)

It is absolutely deplorable that Supernatural hired Hanoi Jane as a coach.

Less we forget her actions during the Vietnam War because she apologized so we should all forgive and forget. Nope. I won't forget.

Fun workout app, even for those who hate exercise!  I have gone into this app to do something (workout or stretch) for almost 2 years straight without missing a single day (gotta keep that streak alive!).  Variety keeps it from getting stale.  New workouts every week with many different music and activity options, and great real-life coaches (not avatars), who you can connect with on the Facebook page. You can choose to work out alone or with others, you can choose low, medium, high, or pros level workouts in boxing or flow (like sword strikes with turns, squats, side lunges, and sometimes leg and/or knee lifts), and you can look at a list of all the songs in a workout before you choose to do it (not something all apps provide). Go ahead and browse the phone app before you sign up, and you will see the plethora of workout options with real, well-known artists' music in many genres - that is what sold me! Yes, it's a subscription, but it's worth it!  You can cancel your gym membership and do this, instead! There are even multiple FB groups who organize workout challenges and group workout "parties" to keep you motivated.  Let's go!

I wish this physical fitness app had weight training as an option, but I did like the coaches and I did like the fact you can play any kind of music you want such as classical!  I had this appfor three or four months but about a month and a half ago I hurt my back, but now I’m looking forward to getting back on track with my fitness!  👏🏻👍🏻😁

I am loving supernatural !!!!  I get a great workout have developed muscles have more stamina and met some really great people playing in the game. I love the music and I love the coaches. Great job!!!￼

I’ve been using the supernatural app for over two years. I have completed all the high-level flows and keep up with the new ones being released. I’m 61 years old and just love all the movement this gives. The choreography for the flows has increased incredibly from its original inception.￼ coach Mark cracks me up!
I bought a aubscription, reset the password 4 times and it still does not recognize my account. How do I cancel and get my money back?

developer_response.body: Hi there! We are sorry to hear that you're experiencing some issues. Please reach out to us at support@getsupernatural.com or utilize our Live Chat feature on getsupernatural.com/faq for immediate assistance. We'll be happy to assist, thanks again for your patience!

reviews.review_description: I am LOVING Supernatural Fitness. I love that there are so many options for different workouts, music, stretching and meditation. It truly feels like you have your own personal trainer. I wish we could search workouts by coach though, as I do like some of the coaching styles more than others (they are all pretty good) I hope this app keeps growing!!
Since pandemic I haven’t been workout, and this program it’s fun and great I’m committing to following the program I feel great and I got more energy, totally love it

What a fun place to be. Great choreography, fun coach, amazing landscape.. this app is fascinating. I wish I could buy a weekly class or group program, and that app would be compatible with Garmin watch but it’s still 5 stars amazing workout!

I have always had a hard time sticking to any workout program, and honestly, they all just felt like a chore. Then I tried supernatural, and I haven't missed a single day of working out since (almost 2 months straight now and still going strong!) I actually look forward to getting off work so that I can hurry home to do my workout.

The scenery is beyond amazing. It’s fun, it’s hard but I’m just concentrating on the orbs before I worry about the triangles hitting me lol. I’m just amazed by the look of it all! Add some more classic rock!!!

This game is not only beautiful with taking you to breathtaking places from around the world ( the views are sick) but in honor of Asian heritage month they have a lot of Kpop tracks like 2NE1, Psy and even Jenny and SuperM!!!!!! So far this fitness app has not disappointed. I sweat a lot and get to move so much to my fave music. I might have to drop the subscription to my other fitness app IDK. They’d have to keep and add the Kpop! 😅 Still tho so grateful it exists and happy I’m trying it out. It’s SO MUCH FUN I LOVE IT!!!!

This game is fantastic!! I've been playing for 2 years now. 
Although I don't interact well with other humans, I'm enjoying the new multi player games. 
Thankful for all the new editions as well as Dwana, Rainier, and Doc.

I am a very anxious person and I have been struggling to find a way to be active at home but I started using supernatural when I got a quest 3 and I have to say I’m a super huge fan. I get a good work out and I’m able to shake off nerves with this program and I really enjoy the encouragement that’s given by the instructors. Really glad I found this program!
I’m 63 and use this game to add on after a strength training workout.  It’s awesome!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback, Athlete! Keep up the great work :)

reviews.review_title: App isn't very intuitive for new users
reviews.review_description: Love the app. At first I didn't feel like I was getting a workout. Then after some digging I found the Getting Started program. It wasn't until I did this that I started feeling a burn in my muscles. My biggest complaint is, why isn't the Getting Started program more front and center? Seriously, if an user creates a new account, the first thing the app should do is prompt the user to calibrate the triangles. Next it should prompt the user to go straight to the Getting Started program. A suggestion would be to give the user a prompt saying "Looks like you're new here. Would you like to check out the Getting Started program?".

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback on Supernatural! We're thrilled to hear that you've found the "Getting Started" program helpful in getting the most out of your workouts. We appreciate your valuable feedback about our onboarding process for new members and are always looking for ways to improve. If you have any other suggestions or need assistance, feel free to reach out to us at support@getsupernatural.com. Thanks again!

reviews.review_description: I've been doing Supernatural workouts for exactly a year, and I have lost weight, and feel great. It's so much fun, and sometimes hard to stop playing!

Cons 

Great verity of music 

Different coaches 

Work out online with real world people 

Great work outs keeps the heart pumping etc 



Cons needs other modes besides the boxing and bats I enjoy the boxing mode then the swinging  the bat mode  needs a different dance mode like fun fit land when u just move your arms around hitting targets with your hands if u ever tried fun fit land then u know what im talking about developer?  Please add a new mode ￼

reviews.review_title: This game is the bomb baby!!!!
reviews.review_description: If you want to get fit, and burn that fat off. This is by far, hands down the best VR boxing app I've ever played, jam out to some of your favorite music by keeping the beat, and I promise you, the weight will fall off fast, and it helps you work on your boxing techniques. I go to the gym 5 times a week and that doesn't make me sweat like this app. It's easy, fun, and there's three modes with trainers guiding you the whole way if need be. I promise, you will not regret getting this app. Thanks guys. Your a life savor. Thanks for equipping me with a better future. And actually making it fun getting fit. My hat is totally off to you all!

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thank you for your review! Your enthusiasm and kind words mean the world to us, and we're honored to be a part of your fitness journey. Thank you for being a part of our community!

reviews.review_description: I’ve been playing this for 5 months now. I love it. The boxing is great as well as the flow (sword) game. I have so much fun that it’s addicting. The music is great. They play all types of music, so you can pick your own genre. I even got some friends addicted to this game as well. I’ve tried other games that were similar but this one is so much better. Some of the other ones didn’t really have music that I knew. This one also does better in accurately measuring if I hit the target. In some of the other ones I’ve tried I would hit the target but it wouldn’t register. I would highly recommend this game. I also would recommend going through the training first to understand how to move in the workout. It helps. If you’re not sure about it just try it for the 2 week trial and then decide. It’s always worth it to try.

reviews.review_title: Great… if you’re in the demographic
reviews.review_description:
To anyone thinking about trying this app out, I would suggest going on a month to month plan. 

If you like being talked to like a teenage girl who snuck into the club, you’ll find it fine. 

If you want an app to just do some cardio and lose some pounds without being told “it’s totally okay if you start twerking right now”, I’d suggest looking elsewhere. This one isn’t the one for you. 

You’ll get tired of it pretty fast.

I love Supernatural because it makes working out fun.  They have a huge volume of music, great trainers with different styles, and both dancing (flow) and boxing style workouts that keep you on your toes.  Beginners can start on Low intensity and be totally winded and after a while you find that you are doing a Pros Only workouts and singing and smiling while you sweat and move your body.  Our entire family enjoys these workouts and in my late 40s, it is my favorite form of fitness.  Don't hesitate. Get it and get fit!

reviews.review_title: Hate to exercise but I love supernatural
reviews.review_description:
I've been using supernatural since 2021, with a 2 year break due to pregnancy and recovery. It's even better now! 
I have Audhd and cannot work out. I can't maintain a routine I hate going to the gym and working out with other people I hate staying home and trying to force myself to do something I don't enjoy. I think runners high is a myth that people lie about. 

But supernatural is incredible. I've worked out almost every day for 2 months now. I feel healthier, my mood is better, I'm able to do the full hour sessions without stopping at all, where I had to stop after 15 minutes just 8 weeks ago.

The songs are great the music selection is diverse and if you sing while you work out, you can kick yourself into zone 5 and 6 for your heart rate and maintain it the full workout (I'm in zone 3 if I don't sing) 

Coach Mark is funny and motivating and by and far my favorite one, but every playlist with every coach is great. 

The chorography is fun and challenging, and while I wouldn't consider myself graceful or coordinated at all I still find the flow natural and intuitive and easy to nail, even on hard mode 

10/10 download the best $10 a month I spend by and far

I absolutely LOVE this app! I’m middle-aged  but very active in the gym and in racquet sports. This is my go to app when I don’t make it to the gym. And even when I do make it to the gym, I love getting in a 2nd fun workout any time of the day with this App.  I like the variety of coaches, music, and activities styles (Flow & Boxing). Keep up the good work!!

reviews.review_title: Love this, my most favorite addiction!
reviews.review_description: I have always struggled finding ways to keep myself active! The fact that not only am I enjoying movement with boxing and flow,  but my mental health has improved tremendously from the coaches positivity to the meditation portion of the app. The best part is the fact that each workout has the views of the world and let's me experience it. I feel like I'm there. This experience has not only got me excited about my health but also has made me a world traveler 😁 Thank you Supernatural!

developer_response.body: Hi there, thanks for the review! We're thrilled to hear that Supernatural has had such a positive impact on your physical and mental well-being! Thank you for sharing your incredible journey with us. We're honored to be a part of your journey!
